Sage Bot Item Code: E16
Engraving Mark of the Vampire

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit steals 5% / 6% / 7% / 9% / 11% / 15% / 20% of the nearest enemy's max health for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 10% / 11% / 12% / 14% / 16% / 20% / 25% of the nearest enemy's max health, physical and magic armor for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 10% / 11% / 12% / 14% / 16% / 20% / 25% of the nearest enemy's max health, physical and magic armor for 5 sec. The unit also increases health, physical and magic armor of a random ally by 25% / 26% / 28% / 30% / 34% / 40% / 48% of their own stats.
